title.en: Great queen of war and fate

summary.zh: 爱尔兰的战争女神，名号可解作“大女王”或“幽灵女王”。化身乌鸦盘旋于战场，预言胜败与死亡，常与巴德布、玛查并称三相。
summary.en: The Irish goddess of war and fate, her name read as 'great queen' or 'phantom queen'. She circles battlefields as a crow, prophesies slaughter, and appears as a triad with Badb and Macha.

description.zh:
摩莉甘是爱尔兰神话中的战争女神，名号“Mórrígan”通常解作“大女王”，另一种词源读作“幽灵女王”。她很少直接持兵刃作战，而是以预言、蛊惑与恐惧左右战局：化作灰黑两色的冠小嘴乌鸦落在阵前，高声宣告谁将横尸；或化作在浅滩上洗涤血衣的老妇，被她洗到衣甲的人必死无疑。文献中她常与巴德布（Badb，“食腐乌鸦”）、玛查（Macha）并列，合称“三摩莉甘”（Morrígna）。

在《夺牛记》（Táin Bó Cúailnge）里，她以贵族少女的形象向库丘林求爱，遭拒后先后化作鳗鱼缠他的脚、母狼惊他的牛群、无角红牛冲撞他，三次都被打伤；随后又扮作挤奶老妪，骗库丘林祝福三次，治好了自己的伤。库丘林战死时，正是一只乌鸦落上他的肩头，围攻者才敢上前——传统认为那就是摩莉甘。在《莫伊图拉之战》中，她于萨温节与达格达在河上相会，许诺神族胜利，战后又吟出一首预言诗，从太平盛世一直说到世界失序的末日。

近代凯尔特复兴运动与奇幻创作把她重塑为“三相女神”的原型之一，亚瑟王传说中的摩根勒菲（Morgan le Fay）是否与她同源，学界至今没有定论。
description.en:
The Morrigan is the great war goddess of Irish tradition. Her name is usually read as 'great queen', though an older etymology gives 'phantom queen'. She rarely fights with weapons; her instruments are prophecy, shape-shifting and dread. She settles over armies as a hooded crow announcing who will fall, or appears as a hag washing bloody gear at a ford, and those whose armour she washes are doomed. Texts often set her in a triad, the Morrigna, alongside Badb the scald-crow and Macha.

In the Tain Bo Cuailnge she comes to Cu Chulainn as a young noblewoman offering love. Refused, she attacks him during his ford-combats as an eel about his legs, a she-wolf stampeding cattle, and a hornless red heifer, and is wounded in each shape; she then tricks a triple blessing out of him in the guise of an old milking woman, which heals her. When Cu Chulainn finally died bound to a standing stone, his enemies dared approach only after a crow settled on his shoulder, understood to be the Morrigan. In Cath Maige Tuired she meets the Dagda at a river at Samhain, pledges her aid, and closes the battle with a double prophecy, first of peace and plenty, then of a world sliding into ruin.

Modern Celtic revival and fantasy writing have remade her as a template of the triple goddess. Whether Morgan le Fay of Arthurian romance descends from her remains an open scholarly question.

value.zh: 乌鸦、鳗鱼、母狼、红牛、洗衣老妇
value.en: Crow, eel, she-wolf, red heifer, washer at the ford

value.zh: 与巴德布、玛查并称 Morrígna
value.en: With Badb and Macha as the Morrigna

sources.zh: 《夺牛记》（Táin Bó Cúailnge，见于12世纪《褐牛之书》）
sources.en: Tain Bo Cuailnge, in Lebor na hUidre (the Book of the Dun Cow), 12th century
Cath Maige Tuired (The Second Battle of Mag Tuired)
